title: metaMe Settings drawer wired in Be tab — Lovable: wire thin client
body:
Claude Code has wired the metaMe Settings panel as a left-entering side drawer in the metaMe Runtime Be tab.

WHAT WAS DONE (Next.js app side):
- Created: components/metame/MetaMeSettingsPanel.tsx — shared settings form component (guardian mode, lead agent, spend autonomy, visibility/skills). Exports: MetaMeSettingsPanel, MetaMeSettings type, loadMetaMeSettings(), saveMetaMeSettings(), METAME_SETTINGS_KEY, METAME_ALPHA_DEFAULTS.
- Updated: app/(shell)/metame/settings/page.tsx — now just wraps MetaMeSettingsPanel.
- Updated: components/metame/MetaMeRuntimeClient.tsx
  * Added settingsDrawerOpen state
  * Added left-entering settings drawer: absolute left-0 top-0 bottom-0 z-50, w-80, translate-x-0/−translate-x-full transition, backdrop overlay on z-40
  * Both mobile and desktop Be button areas now have a small settings sub-button (SlidersHorizontal icon) that opens the drawer
- Removed: /metame/settings link from the main platform Sidebar

LOVABLE ACTION NEEDED - wire the same pattern in the Runtime Thin Client:
1. In the SmartMenu thin client Be tab area: add a small settings sub-button identical to MetaMeRuntimeClient.tsx lines ~4230-4245
2. When tapped, open a left-entering settings drawer:
   - absolute left-0 top-0 bottom-0 within the runtime shell outer container (position: relative)
   - Width: w-80 (320px)
   - Animation: translate-x-0 (open) / -translate-x-full (closed), transition 300ms ease-in-out
   - Backdrop: absolute inset-0 z-40 bg-black/50, click to close
   - Header bar (sticky top): SlidersHorizontal icon + metaMe Settings label + X close button
   - Content: render MetaMeSettingsPanel from components/metame/MetaMeSettingsPanel.tsx
3. Left edge must be flush with left edge of thin client iframe — no sidebar offset.

localStorage key: metame_alpha_settings
Defaults: { guardianMode: true, leadAgent: aigent-kn0w1, budgetPosture: low, receiptVisibility: true, curatedSkillsOnly: true, explanationFirst: true }

Branch: claude/setup-knyt-codex-Mrinp merged to dev
